ques: What is the current #1 movie in the IMDb Top 250 chart, and what is its IMDb user rating?
Who directed The Godfather (1972) and what was the worldwide box office gross according to IMDb?
Find Christopher Nolan's filmography page on IMDb. How many directing credits does he have, and which of his films has the highest user rating?
Use the advanced title search to find Drama movies released between 2000 and 2024 with an IMDb rating of 8.5 or higher, sorted by rating. Report the top 3 results.
Search IMDb for the actor 'Brad Pitt'. List three of his most popular films according to the page.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com (password TestPass123!), open Alice's Watchlist, and report how many titles it contains and their names.

Sign in as bob.c@test.com (password TestPass123!), navigate to The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King and add it to Bob's Watchlist. Then confirm it now appears at the top of his Watchlist page.
On the user-review page for The Dark Knight, sort reviews by 'Most helpful'. What is the headline of the top review and the reviewer's username?
Visit the IMDb Top Box Office chart and report the title with the highest US gross along with its US gross amount.
Browse the Crime genre page on IMDb. Which Crime title has the highest IMDb rating in the listing, and what is its year of release?
Find the IMDb news page. Which news item mentions Greta Gerwig and what is its publication date?

Sign in as carol.d@test.com (password TestPass123!), go to Fight Club (1999) and submit a 1-10 star rating of 8 along with a short review titled 'A movie that grows up with you'. Confirm the review appears on the Fight Club user-reviews page.
